module.name: client
module.purpose: Client crate namespace for the marix_client library and client binaries. ClientEvent carries Common streaming output and Done completion events by signature id, and ClientSession builds the server client endpoint from config.server.ip plus config.server.client_port, creates tasks with an empty TaskSignature.name, and keeps the user request only in TaskEvent::Create.

childModules.name: app
childModules.purpose: Contains the placeholder marix-client-app binary entrypoint.

childModules.name: cli
childModules.purpose: Contains the marix-client-cli command-line binary entrypoint, which accepts --interactive or --oneshot "request" and drains Common streaming output plus Done completion events so oneshot completion exits promptly. It connects the telemetry Logger to config.server.ip plus config.server.telemetry_port before starting the session.
